name: Cursor - all films (batch 5)
query: SELECT film_id,title,release_year FROM film ORDER BY film_id

name: Detect complete

Cursor mode: streams SELECT in batches via DECLARE/FETCH. Each batch emits a message with {payload,batch:{index,rows,total}}. Final message has {payload:[],complete:true,total:N}. Check debug tab and Node-RED log for batch progress.
